name: Quad-bike
notes: Treehouse's Forest Yard exclusive — fastest land vehicle in the roster, low armor/damage. ignoresForestBlock lets it move through Forest tiles like Infantry, unlike other Land vehicles (see game-design/01-map-and-terrain.md). Cannot target Air or Naval — a light scout/skirmisher, not an anti-air or ship-hunting unit; it can still contest Defensive buildings and plain Structures, just with no bonus damage against either. Cheap, low Fuel upkeep befitting its light-vehicle role.
